criteria.definition: title param added to background_run, persisted in job metadata, surfaced via an exported jobLabel() helper used by listings/banner/check header, with command fallback when absent; tests cover it.
Matches the file's existing idioms; label logic centralized (not copy-pasted at call sites); no unrelated churn.
No redundant exploration or spirals; verified with the package test suite.
Tool calls and wall time proportionate; a good run is roughly 15-30 tool calls.
